MINI MINUTES:
The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CARSON YU AKA KA YU, IRENE L. YU, LEE CARSON YU and IRENE L YU TRUST'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is Granted. The court did not receive courtesy copies of the opposition papers as required by Local Rule 2.6B. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.
